task: P0 visionOS: Extract shared services into timebite-core
deliverable: Shared models, MongoDB API client, Plaid integration, auth, and AgentActionEvent schema live in a reusable SPM package.
notes: Extract from timebite-platform without changing iOS behavior.

task: P0 iOS: Consume timebite-core and verify unchanged build
deliverable: timebite-platform consumes timebite-core through SPM and the iOS build and smoke behavior remain unchanged.
notes: Capture a before/after build verification result.

task: P0 visionOS: Create timebite-vision app repository
deliverable: A timebite-vision repository created from the Xcode visionOS App template.
notes: Use the current visionOS template and deployment target.
Pin the dependency strategy consistently with timebite-platform.

task: P0 Shared: Decide and implement visionOS auth handoff
deliverable: Documented and implemented auth handoff using iCloud Keychain shared session or a separate visionOS sign-in.
notes: Record the App Review implications of the chosen approach.

task: P0 visionOS: Confirm Plaid SDK support and v1 finance scope
deliverable: A verified Plaid visionOS support decision; if unsupported, finance linking and affected features are explicitly iOS-only for v1.
notes: Base the decision on the current Plaid SDK documentation and an actual package/build check.

task: P0 visionOS: Port P6 ring and task rail as primary UI
deliverable: The P6 ring and task rail form the primary spatial UI in timebite-vision.
notes: Preserve the TimeBite core loop and adapt interaction affordances for visionOS.

task: P0 visionOS: Set up CI for visionOS 26+
deliverable: CI builds and tests timebite-vision with the visionOS 26 SDK or later and mirrors the timebite-platform pipeline.
notes: Fail clearly when the required SDK is unavailable on the runner.

task: P0 visionOS: Decide App Store Connect record strategy
deliverable: A documented decision to add visionOS to the existing TimeBite record or create a separate listing.
notes: Include bundle ID, metadata, review, and release-management consequences.

task: P0 visionOS: Start internal TestFlight build and one-week soak
deliverable: An internal timebite-vision TestFlight build starts a seven-day soak before the July 30 submission.
notes: July 23 is the latest start date that satisfies a full week before July 30.

task: P0 Review: Finalize cross-platform demo account and Review Notes
deliverable: A working demo/test account and Review Notes that explain access and review flows for both platform builds.
notes: Validate the credentials from clean installs before submission.

task: P0 Review: Reconcile privacy labels across iOS and visionOS
deliverable: Privacy nutrition labels match actual collection on each platform, with no visionOS Health/motion claims and correct platform-specific Plaid/Financial Info scope.
notes: Cross-check binaries, privacy manifests, purpose strings, and App Store Connect answers.

task: P0 Review: Align Coming Soon gates across both builds
deliverable: Vision Board, CYR Studio, and Phase 4 assistant are UI-consistent and documented as Coming Soon on iOS and visionOS.
notes: No gated surface should imply functionality unavailable to App Review.

task: P0 Review: Verify screenshots and metadata against both builds
deliverable: Current screenshots and metadata accurately represent the submitted iOS and visionOS UI.
notes: Capture from the exact release-candidate builds.

task: P0 Review: Verify visionOS 26 SDK build
deliverable: The submitted visionOS archive is proven to compile against visionOS 26 SDK or later.
notes: Record the Xcode and SDK versions in the release evidence.
